homeHighlights.title: Sunflower Saturday
homeHighlights.body: A cozy front-porch note rail for recipes, gratitude, family wins, and the little updates Paige wants right under the hero.
homeHighlights.author: Paige

homeHighlights.title: Family Night Loading
homeHighlights.body: Game-night plans, gentle reminders, and favorite memories can all surface here so the homepage feels alive instead of static.
homeHighlights.author: Dad

blogPosts.title: Kitchen Corner
blogPosts.excerpt: A warm space for dinner notes, simple wins, and the kind of updates you want waiting after school or work.
blogPosts.body: This blog rail is where Paige and Dad can share recipes, family updates, encouragement, and milestone notes without it feeling like a generic CMS.
blogPosts.author: Paige

blogPosts.title: Garden Notes
blogPosts.excerpt: The sunflower world is meant to feel like a living scrapbook cover, not just a backdrop.
blogPosts.body: Every public page shifts the mood of the same family garden. Morning light welcomes visitors in, while evening and night modes make the later pages feel softer and more reflective.
blogPosts.author: Dad

galleryItems.title: Sunflower Walk
galleryItems.caption: A bright memory card for family adventures, art, and snapshots that deserve to be revisited.

galleryItems.title: Golden Hour Scrapbook
galleryItems.caption: The public gallery now has a real content rail ready for future R2-backed uploads and comments.

galleryItems.title: Creative Corner
galleryItems.caption: A place for art, pride, and the little pieces of family life that make the portal feel personal.

messageBoardPosts.name: Neighborhood Friend
messageBoardPosts.message: Sending sunshine and love to the Swain family today.

messageBoardPosts.name: Church Family
messageBoardPosts.message: Praying for a peaceful, joy-filled week for everyone at Paige's Corner.
